name_cn:
DELIGHTFUL Vintage Series!
M40352 Uninspected Version#
■ Size: 35*28*14cm ■
The popular Delightful series is truly amazing!
It has been out of stock since launch,
Casual and lazy style, the look is absolutely stunning!
Perfect for daily commuting, and the capacity is unmatched!
Its comfort is greatly improved with multiple carrying styles!
Versatile and easy to match, practical and high-value popular king!
Trust me, this is a must-have series!
